privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the demodb database in OrientDB with 15 profiles and 15 hotels connected by exactly 34 HasStayed edges injected by setup_task.sh. The collaborative filtering computation yields exactly 4 qualifying profile pairs (shared hotel count >= 2): (1) john.smith and david.jones share 3 hotels (Hotel Artemide, The Savoy, The Plaza Hotel) with Jaccard similarity 0.75; (2) anna.mueller and thomas.schafer share 2 hotels (Hotel Adlon Kempinski, Melia Berlin) with Jaccard 0.6667; (3) maria.garcia and sophie.martin share 2 hotels (Hotel de Crillon, Hotel Arts Barcelona) with Jaccard 0.50; (4) david.jones and anna.mueller share 2 hotels (The Savoy, Hotel Adlon Kempinski) with Jaccard 0.40. This produces 8 bidirectional SimilarTraveler edges. The recommendation phase produces exactly 7 HotelRecommendation vertices: john gets Hotel Adlon Kempinski (score 0.75, by david), david gets Melia Berlin (score 0.40, by anna), maria gets Fairmont Le Manoir (score 0.50, by sophie), sophie gets Hotel Artemide (score 0.50, by maria), anna gets The Plaza Hotel and Hotel Artemide (both score 0.40, by david), and thomas gets The Savoy (score 0.6667, by anna). The RecommendationReport should have TotalRecommendations=7, ProfilesWithRecommendations=6, MostRecommendedHotel='Hotel Artemide' (appears in 2 recommendations), HighestSimilarityPair='david.jones@example.com|john.smith@example.com' (score 0.75), and ReportBatch='collab_q1_2026'. Important data quirk: the setup script drops HasStayed/HasUsedService linked-class constraints (which originally restrict HasStayed.out to Customers class) to allow Profile->Hotel edges, and drops Profiles.Id and Hotels.Id UNIQUE indexes to avoid null-Id insertion conflicts with built-in DemoDB records.
